PUID.description: User ID for file ownership (default: 1000). Ignored on Railway (non-root container).

PGID.description: Group ID for file ownership (default: 1000). Ignored on Railway (non-root container).

STHOMEDIR.description: Syncthing home directory for config, keys, and database. Must match the persistent volume mount path (/var/syncthing) so config and the Sync folder survive redeploys.
